# The Sunday Chronicle

> The Sunday Chronicle is a multi-tenant SaaS that turns any fantasy football league's full history into a polished, public-facing almanac. Commissioners paste their Sleeper, ESPN, or NFL.com league ID; the platform walks back through every season the league has existed and produces a single canonical website covering champions, drafts, head-to-head records, rivalries, weekly pick'ems, and power rankings.

## What it does

- Imports complete league history (every season, every matchup, every draft pick) from Sleeper, ESPN, or NFL.com using just a league ID
- Renders an editorial-style public almanac at jzff.online/leagues/<slug>/ with chapters for standings, season archives, the record book, draft history, manager dossiers, and rivalries
- Auto-syncs in-season with a weekly cron so the public almanac stays current
- Live pick'ems and power rankings during the active season
- Commissioner admin UI for merging cross-platform manager identities, curating rivalries, and configuring divisions

## Who it's for

- Fantasy football commissioners running long-standing dynasty or redraft leagues who want a permanent, shareable record of their league's history
- Leagues that have moved between platforms over the years and want a single unified archive
- Anyone tired of league history living scattered across screenshots, group chats, and platform UIs that change every year

## Platforms supported

- **Sleeper**: full historical + live season support
- **ESPN**: full historical + live season support (private leagues via cookie pasting)
- **NFL.com**: historical seasons only (NFL.com hasn't reopened live leagues this cycle)
- **Yahoo**: coming soon (blocked on Yahoo developer portal)

## Pricing

- **Rookie**: $5/mo or $30/yr — 1 league
- **Veteran**: $15/mo or $75/yr — up to 5 leagues
- **Legend**: $25/mo or $100/yr — unlimited leagues
- 10-day free trial on every plan, one trial per user lifetime

## Live demo

[jzff.online/demo/](https://jzff.online/demo/) — a real fantasy league's seven-year history, fully populated, no signup required

## Key URLs

- Home: https://jzff.online/
- Pricing: https://jzff.online/pricing
- Sign up: https://jzff.online/login?mode=signup
- Demo almanac: https://jzff.online/demo/
- Example live league: https://jzff.online/leagues/pa-milk-society/

## Tech

Next.js 16 + Supabase + Stripe. Single-developer indie product. Built by JZFF (jzffgames@gmail.com).
